parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ slug: $json.client.slug, name: $json.client.name, company: $json.client.company, niche: $json.client.niche, emoji: $json.client.emoji || '👤', instagram_handle: $json.client.instagram_handle || null, status: 'active', phase: 'Onboard', phase_step: 0, client_since: $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd'), next_action: $json.client.next_action, next_action_due: $now.plus(7, 'days').format('yyyy-MM-dd') }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, clientId: $('Build Task Rows').first().json.clientId, email: $('Build Task Rows').first().json.email, message: 'Pilot: client dashboard created' }) }}
